form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Comes off a 33 day let-up. Last outing favourite; won by 2.75 len Doncaster on March 13 over 3300m defeating Lewisham Grove carrying 75.5kg at $1.30 in a hurdle. Start before finished second in a small field at Bangor-On-Dee on February 25 over 3300m, on slow going 3.5 len behind Harry Lowes with 74.5kg at $1.50. Tough to stop again.

form.formComment: Resuming after five months. Finished off last preparation 2 in a small field at Warwick November 19 over 3800m, slow track; 12 len behind Onewaywest with 71.5kg at $34. Previously first up; 5 of 7 runners at Perth April 23 over 3200m, 33 len behind Etalon carrying 70kg at $2.90. This looks a nice race to kick off.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished third of 7 starters at Newbury on March 20 over 3300m, 0.5 len behind Spirou with 70kg at $4.50. form.formComment: Resuming after a three months break. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Southwell February 2 over 3200m. Previously first up; didn't finish the race at Uttoxeter December 19 over 4000m. Looks up against it here and prefer others.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Freshened for 47 days. Last outing finished third of 9 starters at Newbury on February 27 over 3300m, 5.5 len behind Cecilia Star carrying 72.5kg at $5. Start before raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 1.3 len Taunton on February 12 over 3800m on heavy track defeating Five Bar Gate carrying 66kg at $6.50 in a hurdle. Fought on last time. Likely to be there at the finish.
